# 🐺 LXR Blindfold — Tebex Product Description

---

## LXR Blindfold System | RedM Restraint & Roleplay Script

> **By iBoss21 / The Lux Empire — wolves.land**

---

### 🎭 What is LXR Blindfold?

LXR Blindfold is a **production-grade blindfold and restraint system** for RedM servers. It allows players to blindfold others (or themselves) for immersive roleplay scenarios — kidnappings, interrogations, surprises, and more.

---

### ✨ Features

- 🎭 Blindfold the nearest player with a command or item
- 🔒 Self-blindfold for immersive RP scenarios
- 🎲 Configurable escape mechanic with random chance
- 🛒 Optional inventory item requirement
- 🌐 Multi-framework: LXR-Core, RSG-Core, VORP Core, QBR-Core, RedEM:RP, QR-Core
- ⚙️ Fully configurable — commands, items, escape odds, language
- 🛡️ Server-side anti-abuse and rate limiting
- 📖 Full documentation included
- 🔐 Tebex escrow protected

---

### 🖥️ Supported Frameworks

| Framework   | Status             |
|-------------|--------------------|
| LXR-Core    | ✅ Primary         |
| RSG-Core    | ✅ Primary         |
| VORP Core   | ✅ Supported       |
| RedEM:RP    | ✅ Supported       |
| QBR-Core    | ✅ Optional        |
| QR-Core     | ✅ Optional        |
| Standalone  | ✅ Fallback        |

---

### 📋 Commands

| Command           | Description                          |
|-------------------|--------------------------------------|
| `/blindfold`      | Apply blindfold to nearest player    |
| `/unblindfold`    | Remove blindfold from nearest player |
| `/blindfoldme`    | Apply blindfold to yourself          |
| `/unblindfoldme`  | Remove your own blindfold            |

---

### 📦 What's Included

- Full resource with client, server, and shared scripts
- Configuration file with all tunables
- SQL item files for all frameworks
- Blindfold item image
- NUI overlay
- Complete documentation
- Locale support (English, Georgian)
